summary: Iteration 9 - Resort Calendar Backend & Cross-Module Intelligence Testing. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). All calendar, ordering, and operations endpoints working correctly. Frontend loads successfully showing 10/10 engines healthy.
critical_code_review_comments: calendar.py: Well-structured Resort Calendar with 10 seeded outlets and 6 sample events
calendar.py: resort-pulse endpoint correctly generates AI3 insights with capacity alerts, critical events, conflict detection, delivery schedules, and culinary demand
calendar.py: module-feed endpoint properly filters events by department (purchasing, schedule, engineering, culinary, bqt)
ordering.py: outlet-based ordering correctly pulls outlets from calendar_outlets collection
ordering.py: calendar-demand endpoint cross-references menu_items from events with recipe ingredients
operations.py: GET /api/operations/recipe/{recipe_id} returns 404 for non-existent recipes as expected
server.py: Both calendar_router and ordering_router properly registered, seed_calendar called on startup

success_rate.frontend: 100% - App loads correctly with 10/10 engines healthy

seed_data_creation: Test events created with TEST_ prefix for calendar events and recipes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested all Resort Calendar backend endpoints. Calendar has 10 seeded outlets (Main Dining Room, Grand Ballroom, Garden Terrace, Sky Bar & Lounge, Conference Room A/B, Pool Deck, Spa & Wellness Center, Main Kitchen, Pastry Lab) and 6 sample events. The resort-pulse endpoint provides AI3 insights for any date. Module-feed endpoints filter events by department. Ordering module integrates with calendar for outlet-based ordering and calendar-driven demand analysis. All CRUD operations for calendar events work correctly.

backend_tests.calendar_events_create: PASS - Creates new event with correct fields
backend_tests.calendar_events_get: PASS - Returns single event by ID
backend_tests.calendar_events_update: PASS - Updates event and persists changes
backend_tests.calendar_events_delete: PASS - Deletes event and returns 404 on subsequent GET
backend_tests.resort_pulse: PASS - Returns AI3 insights with events, guests, critical alerts
backend_tests.module_feed_purchasing: PASS - Returns delivery and menu-related events
backend_tests.module_feed_bqt: PASS - Returns banquet and large guest events
backend_tests.module_feed_culinary: PASS - Returns prep and menu service events
backend_tests.outlet_orders: PASS - Returns orders for specific outlet
backend_tests.ordering_menu: PASS - Returns 10+ menu items with categories
backend_tests.calendar_demand: PASS - Returns demand analysis with purchase suggestions
backend_tests.invoice_to_inventory: PASS - Processes invoice and returns results

frontend_tests.system_health: PASS - All 10 engines showing green status
